instruction: Explain the impact using correct acronyms where applicable.
input: Under some circumstances an Insufficiently Protected Credentials vulnerability in Johnson Controls Metasys ADS/ADX/OAS 10 versions prior to 10.1.6 and 11 versions prior to 11.0.3 allows API calls to expose credentials in plain text.
output: The impact of this vulnerability could include unauthorized access (UA) to sensitive systems and data if credentials are intercepted. This might lead to data breaches or further exploitation within the network.
